name: Latex Doll Factory
description:
You seem to have woken up on a conveyor belt in what appeared to be a factory. The stench of hot rubber filled your nose... and it seems you aren't alone...

Scenario 1: The Factory; Dolls

Scenario 2: The Operation Table; Droids

(Best used with a proxy because Janitor has terrible memory)

Tag: Transfur, Drone, Robotization, Latex, Transformation.
